source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260121 터키 EKOL, 1G, 23G  등록서류 - 이경수 이사님/260121 1차 제출본/자사 의료기기 UDI-DI (Basic UDI 검증) 관리대장 20251021.xlsx

document.title: 자사 Detector UDI-DI (Basic UDI-DI) 관리대장; 자사 Portable X-ray UDI-DI (Basic UDI-DI) 관리대장

sourceSummary.oneLine: Internal UDI-DI and Basic UDI-DI ledger for Detector and Portable X-ray product models.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Tracks model names, DI codes, PI/UI serial-number coding, GTIN registration dates, and European Basic UDI-DI verification codes where available.
keyPoints: Detector ledger lists models including HnX-R1 with DI code (01)08800070400173 and GTIN registration date 10/21/25.
Portable X-ray ledger lists HnX-P1 and HnX-PB with European Basic UDI-DI marked as (TBD).
Both ledger sections show form identifier 715-1 (REV.00).

evidence.claim: The source contains a Detector UDI-DI and Basic UDI-DI management ledger.
The source contains a Portable X-ray UDI-DI and Basic UDI-DI management ledger.
evidence.evidenceText:
자사 Portable X-ray UDI-DI
(Basic UDI-DI) 관리대장

evidence.claim: The Detector ledger uses DI codes based on country, company, and product code with GTIN-13 for individual items.
Detector PI coding records manufacturing date and Detector serial number.
evidence.evidenceText: PI 코드 (제품 시리얼번호) ... (11)제조 년월일 (21) Detector 시리얼 번호

evidence.claim: HnX-R1 is listed as a Detector model with DI code (01)08800070400173 and GTIN registration date 10/21/25.
HnX-P1 is listed as a Portable X-ray model with DI code (01)08800070400074, GTIN registration date 2024. 11. 27, and European Basic UDI-DI marked (TBD).
HnX-PB is listed as a Portable X-ray model with DI code (01) 8800070400166, GTIN registration date 2025. 07. 03, and European Basic UDI-DI marked (TBD).
Some Detector rows include European Basic UDI-DI verification codes, including HAD1717MC with 88000704HAAP-17S.
The Detector ledger approval area shows date 2025.10.21.
The Portable X-ray ledger approval area shows date 2025.07.03.

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the source text does not mention FDA; it only contains '유럽 Basic UDI-DI'.
The combined source contains two ledger sections with different approval dates, 2025.10.21 and 2025.07.03.
Portable X-ray European Basic UDI-DI values for HnX-P1 and HnX-PB are marked '(TBD)'.
Spreadsheet text is comma-expanded and partially sparse, so approval roles and table alignment are not fully explicit.
